summary:
No direct evidence links rhamnose to aging processes such as cellular senescence, mitochondrial decline, or inflammatory signaling. Among reviewed studies focusing on sugar-related metabolites, only structurally analogous substances like acarbose exhibit age-modulating properties; these mechanisms remain unreported for rhamnose itself.  

$\boxed{\text{NO}}$

$\boxed{\text{NO}}$. Answer choice: B
